text:
their meanings are as follows: 

• ws_ - Westat derived variables 

• su_ - Survey processing variables 

• sa_ - Administrative variables 

• r_ - Survey variables with response categories reverse-coded 

name LABEL FORMAT 

ins_have_oth RECODE : Have health insurance other than medicare YNA 
ins_medigap RECODE : Other insurance-medigap supplemental YNE 
ins_employer RECODE : Other insurance-employer, union YNE 
ins_veteran RECODE : Other insurance-veteran benefit YNE 
ins_military RECODE :
